The chromium content of the steel varies depending on the type of steel processed.  The facility is a custom forge facility.  As such, the types of steel processed on a yearly basis vary depending on the active markets.

Manganese content of the incoming metals varies depending on type of metal processed.  The facility is a custom forging facility.  Therefore, the grades of steel used from year to year vary depending on which markets are active.

In 2003, 3,126,721 kg of steel was shipped off site for recycling with a chromium content of approximately 1%.  In 2004, 4,676,079 kg of steel was shipped of site for recycling with a chromium content of approximately 2.1%.
